# WINetworkSharingError.wifiNetworkSharingUnsupported

**Case**

Indicates the device doesn’t support Wi-Fi network sharing.

## Declaration

```swift
case wifiNetworkSharingUnsupported
```
title: WINetworkSharingError.wifiNetworkSharingUnsupported
